methodsAttempted.query: site:zhaw.ch ("Self-Service" OR "IT Compliancy Check" OR "Cloud & App Due Diligence" OR "approved systems") ("generative AI" OR KI OR ChatGPT) ZHAW
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search confirmed the public PDFs refer to the ZHAW Self-Service portal for approved systems and the IT Compliancy Check, but no public approved-systems list was found.
robots.txt allows public crawling except TYPO3 and query-id paths; the public PDF under /storage/ was accessible but treated as school-specific context only.
The host returned 404 for /robots.txt and public PDF URLs returned HTTP 200; fetching was limited to directly discovered public ZHAW governance PDFs.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found ZHAW public governance PDFs from the President's Office/Academic Affairs Unit on generative AI in assessments and declaration duties. A school-specific LSFM handout and a research/competence-centre page were recorded but not used for university-wide claims.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Z-RL-Richtlinie Anhang Deklarationspflicht KI bei Arbeiten
Z-MB-Information sheet on the use of generative AI for graded assignments

artifacts.claimText: ZHAW has a public university guideline, valid from 1 March 2025, on the use of generative AI systems in assessments.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: For ZHAW examinations, specific generative AI systems are not allowed unless they are explicitly stated as permitted aids.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: For ZHAW graded assignments, generative AI systems that shape the assignment's content are subject to a declaration obligation so that the AI contribution is recognizable.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: ZHAW's declaration annex requires incorporated generative-AI output to be cited, requires listed tools and purposes for text creation or editing uses, and generally requires a method-section description of AI use.

citation.citationTitle: Z-RL-Richtlinie Anhang Deklarationspflicht KI bei Arbeiten
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: ZHAW states that personal data, data requiring heightened protection, and legally or contractually confidential data may not be processed with generative AI systems unless ZHAW has reviewed and approved those systems for data-protection compliance.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: For evaluating assessments, ZHAW says teaching staff may use generative AI only as an aid for open-ended task formats and should refrain from using software to detect AI-generated text for assessment purposes.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Version: 3.0.0 gültig ab: 01.03.2025 ... Diese Richtlinie inklusive des Anhangs Deklarationspflicht KI bei Arbeiten ... erläutert die Verwendung generativer KI-Systeme bei summativen (bewertungsrelevanten) Leistungsnachweisen und richtet sich an Mitarbeitende der ZHAW.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Version 3.0.0, valid from 01.03.2025; the guideline explains the use of generative AI systems in summative, assessment-related assessments and is aimed at ZHAW employees.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Sofern spezifische generative KI-Systeme nicht explizit als erlaubte Hilfsmittel angegeben werden, ist ihre Verwendung bei einer Prüfung unerlaubt.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Unless specific generative AI systems are explicitly stated as permitted aids, their use in an examination is not allowed.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Der Anteil bzw. das Ausmass des Mitwirkens von generativen KI-Systemen an der schöpferischen Leistung ... muss für Dritte erkennbar sein. Grundsätzlich gilt daher eine Deklarationspflicht für alle generativen KI-Systeme, welche eine Arbeit inhaltlich mitgestalten.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The share or extent of generative AI's contribution must be recognizable to third parties; there is a declaration obligation for all generative AI systems that shape a graded assignment's content.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Z-RL-Richtlinie Anhang Deklarationspflicht KI bei Arbeiten
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Ein generatives KI-System ist im Text der Arbeit zu zitieren, wenn schöpferische Inhalte ... in die eigene Arbeit ... eingebaut werden. ... die verwendeten Werkzeuge unter Angabe des Verwendungszwecks ... aufgelistet ... Zur besseren Erkennbarkeit ... muss generell ... beschrieben werden, wie generative KI-Systeme in der Arbeit verwendet wurden.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The annex requires citing incorporated AI-generated content, listing the tools and purposes for text creation/editing uses, and generally describing how generative AI systems were used.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Z-RL-Richtlinie Anhang Deklarationspflicht KI bei Arbeiten
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Personendaten und andere Daten mit erhöhtem Schutzbedarf sowie Daten, welche einer vertraglichen oder gesetzlichen Geheimhaltung unterliegen, dürfen nicht mit generativen KI-Systemen bearbeitet werden, sofern diese Systeme hierfür nicht von der ZHAW datenschutzrechtlich geprüft und freigegeben worden sind.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Personal data, data requiring heightened protection, and contractually or legally confidential data may not be processed with generative AI unless ZHAW has reviewed and approved the systems for data-protection compliance.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Zudem dürfen KI-Systeme bei der Bewertung offener Aufgabenformate nur als Hilfsmittel eingesetzt werden. Die Verwendung von Software zur Erkennung von KI-generierten Texten zum Zweck der Leistungsbewertung ist zu unterlassen.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: AI systems may be used only as an aid when evaluating open-ended task formats; software for detecting AI-generated text for assessment purposes is to be refrained from.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Narrow source-status claim supported by public ZHAW guideline metadata.
Claim is limited to examinations and mirrors section 6.1 of the guideline.
Claim is limited to graded assignments and declaration of content-shaping generative AI systems.
Claim summarizes declaration mechanisms from the German annex without adding broader academic-integrity conclusions.
Privacy claim is directly scoped to the guideline text on protected/confidential data and ZHAW data-protection approval.
Claim is limited to assessment evaluation practices in section 9 and does not generalize to all teaching uses.

artifacts.title: Zurich University of Applied Sciences (ZHAW) generative AI assessment guidance
artifacts.summary: ZHAW publishes central guidance for generative AI in assessments, including default non-permission for exams unless allowed, declaration duties for graded assignments, protected-data restrictions tied to ZHAW approval, and limits on AI use in assessment evaluation.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The public ZHAW Self-Service portal references for approved systems were not accessed because they appear to require ZHAW login; no claim lists approved AI systems.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
